tests.source_program:
define i32 @scmp_sub_nsw_branch_condition(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %diff = sub nsw i32 %x, %y
  %cmp = call i8 @llvm.scmp(i32 %diff, i32 0)
  %is_neg = icmp slt i8 %cmp, 0
  br i1 %is_neg, label %neg, label %pos
neg:
  ret i32 -1
pos:
  ret i32 1
}

  %is_neg = icmp slt i8 %cmp, 0
  br i1 %is_neg, label %neg, label %pos

pos:

tests.source_program:
define i16 @scmp_sub_nsw_multiple_calls(i32 %a, i32 %b, i32 %c, i32 %d) {
  %diff1 = sub nsw i32 %a, %b
  %cmp1 = call i8 @llvm.scmp(i32 %diff1, i32 0)
  %diff2 = sub nsw i32 %c, %d
  %cmp2 = call i8 @llvm.scmp(i32 %diff2, i32 0)
  %ext1 = zext i8 %cmp1 to i16
  %ext2 = zext i8 %cmp2 to i16
  %result = add i16 %ext1, %ext2
  ret i16 %result
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:

  %cmp2 = call i8 @llvm.scmp(i32 %c, i32 %d)

  %ext2 = zext i8 %cmp2 to i16

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary describes single scmp transformation; this tests multiple independent scmp operations in same function which tests scalability not covered in summary

alive2.src:
define i16 @scmp_sub_nsw_multiple_calls(i32 %a, i32 %b, i32 %c, i32 %d) {
  %diff1 = sub nsw i32 %a, %b
  %cmp1 = call i8 @llvm.scmp(i32 %diff1, i32 0)
  %diff2 = sub nsw i32 %c, %d
  %cmp2 = call i8 @llvm.scmp(i32 %diff2, i32 0)
  %ext1 = zext i8 %cmp1 to i16
  %ext2 = zext i8 %cmp2 to i16
  %result = add i16 %ext1, %ext2
  ret i16 %result
}

define i16 @scmp_sub_nsw_multiple_calls(i32 %a, i32 %b, i32 %c, i32 %d) {
  %cmp1 = call i8 @llvm.scmp.i8.i32(i32 %a, i32 %b)
  %cmp2 = call i8 @llvm.scmp.i8.i32(i32 %c, i32 %d)
  %ext1 = zext i8 %cmp1 to i16
  %ext2 = zext i8 %cmp2 to i16
  %result = add nuw nsw i16 %ext1, %ext2
  ret i16 %result
}
